quote: Riwayat made my wedding sherwani feel like it was made for royalty. The fit was flawless and the embroidery breathtaking.

quote: From consultation to delivery, the experience was seamless. My three-piece suit drew compliments all night.

quote: The attention to detail is unmatched. They truly understand classic menswear and modern tailoring alike.
